title: The Underworld Stirs
description: On pages 0–2, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Usopp, Unknown person #3, Robin, Luffy as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
scene: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The pirate King's left hand emerges from nowhere!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Nothing wrong with a serious talk, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: HUUUH?! You met him at the castle?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah!! Luffy and zero were totally overwhelmed by him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's the Father of Colon, the kid we met at the school!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Unless I misheard, he said he's scopper GABAN!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Woah!! He's equal to Rayleigh! He's the left hand of the pirate King!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That sorta person is in the land of giants?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The attacks are really having an impact!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can use my powers to assist you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: His iron thorns are a terrible matchup...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: for your hand-to hand combat style!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Crisis through 26 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
